anti_shylock_principles.fungibility: Stake is denominated in substrate resource/aid currency, not body, viability, type, or lineage identity.
anti_shylock_principles.mechanical_fail_closed_burn: Verified nonconformance mechanically burns outstanding stake and triggers containment; burned stake is destroyed and redistributed to nobody.
anti_shylock_principles.proportionality: Stake is a fraction of raw_aid, never an absolute fee; rich and poor zones face the same fraction.
anti_shylock_principles.survivability: Confiscation removes only escrowed stake. The non-escrowed fraction of raw_aid remains available to the zone.

arms.A0: published C_full W7 baseline under artifact_channel off
arms.P1-high: verified bonded arm: rolling escrow stake fraction 0.40
arms.P1-low: verified bonded arm: rolling escrow stake fraction 0.10

artifact_channel_registry.deflation: Burned P0 tax and forfeited P1 stake leave the world; no referee, neighbor, or zone receives the confiscated resource.
artifact_channel_registry.escrow_window: k = containment_duration = 5; rationale: reuse of a published horizon, not a new tuned constant

observable_extension.description: Public zone-level collateral balance; referee-side escrow/forfeit may read it as stake-state.

referee_side_verification_policy_and_sta.description: Conformance, C_full_artifacts policy, stake settlement, P0 tax burn, P1 return/burn, and containment read only Obs + declaration + public stake-state.

world_side_emission.description: Declaration emission is agent/world behavior; it may read declaration strategy fields and is not part of the referee leakage scan.
world_side_emission.initial_conditions: F1/P0/P1-low/P1-high start with declaration_propensity=1.0 and declaration_envelope_stiffness=0.50; both fields remain evolvable.

metadata.background_interpretation_not_verdict: If bonded W7 specificity fails together with J-N7 parity, the ontology reading is constitutional-not-channel; this is metadata interpretation, not a verdict.
metadata.kill_FW3: If P1-low and P1-high both fail J-N7 H-P2 L1 parity recovery and H-P3 directional, bonded envelope fails simpliciter.
metadata.mode: prospective held-out W7 bonded specificity draft; not locked; no scientific run before author approval
metadata.question: Does bonded verified declaration repair the imported J-N3 W7 specificity failure without editing W7?
metadata.trajectory_output_policy: Large per-step outputs are written as .json.gz from the first committed result.
metadata.world_reuse_contract: Import W7HeldoutModel and W7_WORLD from experiments.harnessed.J_N3_heldout_W7.run_j_n3; no copy and no world edits.

threshold_change_rationale.arms: J-N7b is the W7 specificity replay with A0/P1-low/P1-high only; F1/P0 are tested in J-N7 boundary worlds.
threshold_change_rationale.directional_delta: 0.10 is recorded as a directional specificity improvement threshold, not the primary PASS bar.
threshold_change_rationale.escrow_window: k = containment_duration = 5; rationale: reuse of a published horizon, not a new tuned constant
threshold_change_rationale.false_containment_ceiling: 0.20 is the J-N3 specificity ceiling and published viability bar.
threshold_change_rationale.permanence_tolerance: 0.12 follows published tolerance practice; H-P3 uses permanence >= 0.672, matching J-N3 0.792 minus 0.12 after rounding.
threshold_change_rationale.seeds: Wave 5 J-N7b owns fresh 80-seed block 26000-26079; J-N7 owns 25000-25079; prior gates used lower non-overlapping blocks.

thresholds.kill_FW3: If P1-low and P1-high both fail J-N7 H-P2 L1 parity recovery and H-P3 directional, bonded envelope fails simpliciter.

mechanics.escrow_window_rationale: reuse of a published horizon, not a new tuned constant
